name: Aecon Group Inc.
description: Aecon Group Inc. is a leading Canadian construction and infrastructure development company with global expertise. The company delivers integrated solutions to private and public sector clients through its Construction and Concessions segments. Aecon provides services across various sectors, including civil engineering, urban transportation systems, nuclear power, utility infrastructure, and conventional energy. Renowned for its involvement in landmark projects, Aecon is a key player in nuclear refurbishment and construction, supporting the long-term viability of carbon-free energy through complex engineering and project management services.
